code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut uniques: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(text, i)
        when Some(x)
          if is_ws(x)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end

    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(x)
        if x == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if x == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end

      mut value = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(text, i)
          when Some(x)
            if is_digit(x)
              value = value * 10 + (x - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              parsing = false
            end
          when None
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end

      let result_value = value * sign
      if not list.contains(uniques, result_value)
        uniques = list.push(uniques, result_value)
      end
    end
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = uniques
  while list.len(remaining) > 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      mut next_list: List<Int> = []
      mut skipped = false
      for x in remaining
        if not skipped and x == m
          skipped = true
        else
          next_list = list.push(next_list, x)
        end
      end
      remaining = next_list
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
